inputs.label: Property Value
inputs.businessContext: The total purchase price or assessed value of the property.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total purchase price or assessed value of the property.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Mülkün toplam satın alma fiyatı veya değerleme tutarı.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le prix d'achat total ou la valeur estimée de la propriété.
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio de compra total o valor tasado de la propiedad.

inputs.label: Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: The applicable land transfer tax rate as a percentage (e.g., 2.5 for 2.5%).

businessContext_i18n.en: The applicable land transfer tax rate as a percentage (e.g., 2.5 for 2.5%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Geçerli emlak vergisi oranı yüzde olarak (örneğin, %2.5 için 2.5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anwendbarer Grunderwerbsteuersatz in Prozent (z. B. 2,5 für 2,5 %).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le taux applicable des droits de mutation immobilière en pourcentage (par exemple, 2,5 pour 2,5 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto a la transferencia de terrenos aplicable como porcentaje (ej., 2.5 para 2.5%).

inputs.label: First-Time Buyer Exemption
inputs.businessContext: Maximum exemption amount available for first-time home buyers. Set to 0 if not applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum exemption amount available for first-time home buyers. Set to 0 if not applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İlk kez ev sahibi olanlar için mevcut maksimum muafiyet tutarı. Geçerli değilse 0 girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximaler Befreiungsbetrag für Erstkäufer. Auf 0 setzen, wenn nicht zutreffend.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Montant d'exemption maximal disponible pour les primo-accédants. Mettre à 0 si non applicable.
businessContext_i18n.es: Monto máximo de exención disponible para compradores primerizos. Establecer en 0 si no aplica.

inputs.label: First-Time Buyer?
inputs.businessContext: 1 if buyer qualifies as a first-time buyer, else 0.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 if buyer qualifies as a first-time buyer, else 0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Alıcının ilk kez ev sahibi olma durumu: 1 ise uygun, 0 değil.
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 wenn der Käufer als Erstkäufer qualifiziert ist, sonst 0.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 si l'acheteur est un primo-accédant, sinon 0.
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 si el comprador califica como primerizo, si no 0.

inputs.label: Administrative Fee
inputs.businessContext: Government administrative or registration fee, if any.

businessContext_i18n.en: Government administrative or registration fee, if any.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varsa devlet idari veya kayıt ücreti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Staatliche Verwaltungs- oder Registrierungsgebühr, falls vorhanden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais administratifs ou d'enregistrement gouvernementaux, le cas échéant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tarifa gubernamental administrativa o de registro, si la hay.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
